title: BEM-864 mailbox marker check
objective:
Run script:
"""
response = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md')
text = response.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if response.exists() else ''
finals = ['APPROVED', 'APPROVED_WITH_AMENDMENTS', 'BLOCKED_WITH_REASON']
status = None
for item in finals:
    if item in text and 'PENDING_CLAUDE_RESPONSE' not in text:
        status = item
        break
base = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
if status:
    marker = base / ('BEM864_MAILBOX_FINAL_' + status + '.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-864 mailbox marker\nStatus: FINAL_FOUND\nFinal: ' + status + '\nSource: governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md\n', encoding='utf-8')
else:
    marker = base / 'BEM864_MAILBOX_WAITING_FOR_CLAUDE_RESPONSE.md'
    marker.write_text('# BEM-864 mailbox marker\nStatus: WAITING_FOR_CLAUDE_RESPONSE\nSource: governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM859_PROTOCOL_ALIGNMENT_RESPONSE.md\nNote: route exists, but Claude final answer is not in mailbox yet.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('mailbox marker check: ' + ('FINAL_' + status if status else 'WAITING_FOR_CLAUDE_RESPONSE'))
"""
No issue comments.
